name: nemohire
description: AI-powered hiring copilot: builds a persistent professional identity, sources jobs (or takes a jobs file directly), and applies to them — in your own voice, submitted automatically once every question is answered. A single apply-agent handles each job start to finish (browse, write, fill, submit, track locally); apply-batch-agent runs jobs in bounded batches so token cost doesn't compound across a long run, checkpointing every finished job so an interrupted run can resume with /nemohire:continue. Notion sync and email sync are separate, on-demand commands, never automatic.
